# PixoPDF Full Specifications

PixoPDF is a privacy-first, zero-signup static web application containing 34 active PDF management and format conversion tools.

Public website:
https://pixopdf.online/

## Privacy Architecture
PixoPDF processes all files locally inside your web browser tab. No file or document content is uploaded to any PixoPDF document-processing server.

## Complete Tool Inventory

### Sign PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/sign-pdf/
- Description: Sign PDF online for free. Draw touch signatures or type electronic names.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Edit PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/edit-pdf/
- Description: Add texts, visual replacements, and drawings. Processed strictly locally.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Add Text to PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/add-text-to-pdf/
- Description: Type text boxes onto PDF documents and customize font parameters.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Add Image to PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/add-image-to-pdf/
- Description: Overlay transparent PNG, JPG, and WebP images on PDF pages.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Annotate PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/annotate-pdf/
- Description: Draw highlight rectangles, underlines, or strike through sections online.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Fill PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/fill-pdf/
- Description: Visually add checkmarks, texts, dates, and initials on regular PDFs.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### PDF Form Filler
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/pdf-form-filler/
- Description: Fill interactive forms and save input text fields, dropdowns, and checkboxes.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Add Page Numbers
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/add-page-numbers/
- Description: Add formatted page numbers to your PDF document online for free.
- Expected Input: Images/DOCX/XLSX/PPTX
- Expected Output: PDF

### Add Watermark
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/add-watermark/
- Description: Add text watermarks to your PDF pages with custom options.
- Expected Input: Images/DOCX/XLSX/PPTX
- Expected Output: PDF

### Redact PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/redact-pdf/
- Description: Rasterized redaction removes underlying page content from rebuilt redacted pages.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Merge PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/merge-pdf/
- Description: Combine multiple PDF files into one document online for free.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Split PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/split-pdf/
- Description: Extract specific page ranges or split every page into separate documents.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Rotate PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/rotate-pdf/
- Description: Rotate individual pages or all pages clockwise or counter-clockwise visually.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Remove PDF Pages
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/remove-pdf-pages/
- Description: Delete unwanted pages from your PDF file online easily.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Extract PDF Pages
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/extract-pdf-pages/
- Description: Extract specific page ranges into a separate, standalone PDF document.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Organize PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/organize-pdf/
- Description: Drag and drop to reorder, delete, or rotate pages in your PDF file.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Compress PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/compress-pdf/
- Description: Optimize PDF document size by compressing embedded raster images.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Crop PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/crop-pdf/
- Description: Crop PDF pages visually by adjusting bounding crop box parameters.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### PDF Metadata Viewer
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/pdf-metadata/
- Description: Read PDF file metadata headers locally to inspect document properties.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Remove PDF Metadata
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/remove-pdf-metadata/
- Description: Removes supported PDF metadata fields locally inside your browser.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### JPG to PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/jpg-to-pdf/
- Description: Convert JPG, JPEG, and PNG images into a clean PDF document.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### PNG to PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/png-to-pdf/
- Description: Convert PNG images to PDF online with layout and orientation options.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Images to PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/images-to-pdf/
- Description: Convert multiple JPG, JPEG, and PNG images into a single PDF document online.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Image to PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/image-to-pdf/
- Description: Convert JPG, PNG, and WebP files into PDF pages with visual margin configurations.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Word to PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/word-to-pdf/
- Description: Convert Microsoft Word DOCX files into clean PDF documents locally in your browser.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### Excel to PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/excel-to-pdf/
- Description: Convert Microsoft Excel XLSX worksheets into clean PDF page grids in your browser.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### PowerPoint to PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/powerpoint-to-pdf/
- Description: Convert PPTX slide presentations into static PDF documents locally.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### HTML to PDF
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/html-to-pdf/
- Description: Paste raw HTML layouts to render and export them to PDF securely inside your browser.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: PDF

### PDF to JPG
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/pdf-to-jpg/
- Description: Convert pages of a PDF document into high-quality JPG images.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: Images/DOCX/XLSX/PPTX/ZIP

### PDF to PNG
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/pdf-to-png/
- Description: Convert PDF pages into transparent PNG images online locally.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: Images/DOCX/XLSX/PPTX/ZIP

### PDF to Images
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/pdf-to-images/
- Description: Extract PDF pages to JPG, PNG, and WebP formats packed into a ZIP download.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: Images/DOCX/XLSX/PPTX/ZIP

### PDF to Word
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/pdf-to-word/
- Description: Convert PDF documents into editable Word DOCX files reconstructing structural layers.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: Images/DOCX/XLSX/PPTX/ZIP

### PDF to Excel
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/pdf-to-excel/
- Description: Extract structured tables from PDF files into editable Excel XLSX spreadsheets.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: Images/DOCX/XLSX/PPTX/ZIP

### PDF to PowerPoint
- Canonical URL: https://pixopdf.online/pdf-to-powerpoint/
- Description: Convert PDF slides into Microsoft PowerPoint PPTX slide presentations locally.
- Expected Input: PDF
- Expected Output: Images/DOCX/XLSX/PPTX/ZIP

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Is PixoPDF secure?
Yes. Files do not leave your device. All calculations occur locally in client memory.

### Are there any subscription fees?
No. All tools are 100% free with no signup requirements.
